title: LitLoom 4.0.0
message: This update tightens playback, downloads, Library, reader stability, and the LitLoom UI.
changelog: Mini-player close now stops playback instead of only hiding the bar.
Audiobook chapter downloads now save inside the app, including per-chapter download actions.
Player download, sleep, queue, chapter, and save actions are wired to real app state.
Library now includes real Downloads, listening history, and saved favorites.
Book downloads save inside the app and the reader uses the resolved local reading flow.
Added LitLoom share deeplinks with a public install/update fallback.
Forced bundled Roboto across app UI.
